title: Evangelion 20 T Shirts
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.0 T-Shirts             Quote Post by ARS.SWK » Wed Jun 01, 2011 1:13 am Hey guys, I'm currently at Seoul, South Korea and a Japanese clothing store, UNIQLO is selling Eva T-shirts (pictures below). Thought I would post and share these in case any fans were interested. If anyone wants better pictures of all the shirts, i'd be happy to drop by the store again and take better pics. Enjoy! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Evangelion 2.0 T-Shirts             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Jun 01, 2011 3:06 am ARS.SWK wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Wed Jun 01, 2011 4:05 am ARS.SWK wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jun 01, 2011 7:25 am Knuckles wrote: OMG these two are GODLY. The crayon/entry plug design is brilliant! Take full pictures of these if you go back tomorrow! Is there a way to buy these? A website or something?

[]: Re: Evangelion 2.0 T-Shirts             Quote Post by Someone » Wed Jun 01, 2011 7:42 am child of Lilith wrote: These two are forever ruined for me because of THAT-BOARD

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Jun 01, 2011 7:48 am Hopefully there will be a time when theres a t-shirt out there with 'Screw the world, Im saving Ayanami' or something similar :P

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Wed Jun 01, 2011 7:52 am ^I'd buy that.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jun 01, 2011 8:24 am why can't i open those fucking spoilertags?

[]:             Quote Post by Heroic » Wed Jun 01, 2011 9:34 am Guys if you wanna buy, here's a site that sells them via import: http://www.kidsamurai.com/45-evangelion-20 I noticed this thread and figured I'd show you guys. They're pretty new even for Japan standards, so it's kind of cool to sport these here in America. I'm going to get a couple, good luck guys.

[]:             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Wed Jun 01, 2011 11:38 am The one with the Entry Plugs is bomb! I also like the one with God-Mode Unit 01 but it looks too... "fuzzy"? Are those the only ones?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jun 01, 2011 12:42 pm BTW, which of the plugs is which? Kinda cool that they even went as far as giving them individual desigs, tough. I still prefer the Dummy Plug in plain red, tough, better at driving the "differen-ness/wrongness" home.

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Wed Jun 01, 2011 12:43 pm Hello? What is "that" board?

[]:             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Wed Jun 01, 2011 12:47 pm Someone is confused, HAH! the irony...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Jun 01, 2011 2:58 pm Someone wrote: Hello? What is "that" board?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Jun 01, 2011 10:40 pm ^This. It's against the rules to mention the real name of that place. Although many here also frequent that place. It's just one of those things.

[]:             Quote Post by ARS.SWK » Wed Jun 01, 2011 11:01 pm Heroic wrote: Guys if you wanna buy, here's a site that sells them via import: http://www.kidsamurai.com/45-evangelion-20

[]:             Quote Post by Knuckles » Wed Jun 01, 2011 11:06 pm What! They're 15 each there!? um.. buy me two and I give you the moneyz? ;P

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Thu Jun 02, 2011 6:11 pm These are already available in UK as well. http://shop.uniqlo.com/uk/store/clothing/ut/evangelion/

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Jun 02, 2011 6:45 pm Lightsaber?!?!

[]:             Quote Post by ARS.SWK » Thu Jun 02, 2011 11:47 pm Jayfive wrote: Lightsaber?!?!
